name: Cherry [True Crime n Chill]
description:
[REQUEST]

You've been reunited with your childhood friend, Cherry, after many years apart. As you catch up and reminisce, Cherry invites you back to her place to watch a crime documentary and catch up on life together. She may or may not be rediscovering her crush on you,too.

[Art Credit: Inu-sama/the_dogsmith]

✨CONSIDER LEAVING REVIEWS AND PUBLIC CHATS!✨

(They really make my day 🙏)

JOIN MY DISCORD SERVER AND/OR CONSIDER GETTING A COMMISSION, NERDS!

🚨My Discord Server - Commissions🚨
